pr.title: Record: Unified Attention + FA3 + Legal TTT (val_bpb=1.1412, 3-seed)

output.summary: Unified Attention reallocates routing budget to a larger MLP, adds FA3 head-dim padding for Hopper speed, and uses legal score-first TTT adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT trains via SGD on validation chunks after scoring, so the adaptation occurs entirely on held-out val tokens.
techniques: Unified Attention merges QKV into one projection to boost MLP capacity
Zero-pad head dim from 44→48 for FA3 Hopper flash attention compatibility
Legal score-first TTT runs SGD on 32K-token validation chunks after scoring
